videos.title: Loppet ski races canceled this weekend due to bitter cold | FOX 9 KMSP
videos.description:
Due to the bitter cold forecasted for this weekend, the Loppet Foundation will be canceling some of its events for the City of Lakes Loppet Winter Festival, according to organizers.
Subscribe for more from FOX 9: https://bit.ly/3p5NDSU
videos.transcript:

videos.title: 2019 Lapham Loppet XC Freestyle and Classical Ski Race

videos.title: World's largest winter wonderland
videos.description: Despite freezing temperatures of almost minus twenty degrees Celsius, visitors flocked to this year's Harbin Ice and Snow World. The annual event is the best-known winter theme park in China and also the world's largest ice and snow theme park. China View takes you there.
